candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Extra study sessions were offered to students after the midterm to help improve their understanding of statistics. Student scores on the midterm and the final exam were recorded. The following scatterplot shows final test scores against the midterm test scores. Which of the following statements correctly interprets the scatterplot?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
